title.en: However, he was not the only one.

content.en:
"What a sturdy array!"

Ye Tian knew that he still underestimated the horror of this Infinite Prison Heavenly Array, no wonder the Infinite Heavenly Palace had arranged this formation, it was expected that he would not be able to break the formation!

However, he was not the only one.

Airplanes!!!!!

The replica bodies were condensed, all gathered here, and then combined into a battle array, all attacking this Infinite Prison Heavenly Array.

Rumble!!!!

Under the blow, the entire Infinite Prison Heavenly Array began to tremble violently, but it was still not broken.

"There is hope!"

Ye Tian said in surprise.

Instantly, he let the replica bodies burn the origin, sacrificing his life to deliver a blow.

In this case, it should be possible to break the Infinite Prison Heavenly Array.

Subsequently, he did just that.

In an instant, the origin of a replica body burned out in an instant, and it struck the Infinite Prison Heavenly Array with all its strength.

Click!

The Infinite Prison Heavenly Array was cracked a little bit.

If the outside world had the Dao Realm to repair the Infinite Prison Heavenly Array, it would soon be able to repair this Infinite Prison Heavenly Array, but now the Infinite Heavenly Palace would not dare to send someone to repair the Infinite Prison Heavenly Array, which gave Ye Tian hope to escape.

Subsequently, he continued to copy his body, continuing to burn his origin to attack the Infinite Prison Heavenly Array.

In this way, the rift on the Infinite Prison Heavenly Array grew bigger and bigger.

Finally.

Bang!!!!

The Infinite Prison Heaven Array was completely broken by Ye Tian.

If the Wuji Heavenly Palace knew that the Wuji Heavenly Array had been broken by Ye Tian of the Triple Dao Realm, it would definitely be dumbfounded, this was the Wuji Prison Heavenly Array that could only be broken by the Sevenfold Dao Realm, but relying on Ye Tian's life, it was broken.

With the Infinite Prison Heaven Array being broken, Ye Tian could also come out of the Origin Realm.

Subsequently, one of his duplicate bodies came out of the Origin Realm, and then contacted the Dragon Qin Palace Master.

......

Taisu Palace.

The Longqin Palace Master sent a message to Tai Su and informed Ye Tian that he had broken through the formation and came out.

As soon as this news came out, the Taisu Palace Master and others were extremely shocked.

"Ye Tian broke through the Infinite Prison Heaven Array??? how is this possible!"

The Longqin Palace Master was shocked.

She just let all the Sixfold Dao Realm of Taisu Palace enter the battlefield of the True Dao Domain, and attacked the Infinite Prison Heaven Array, but she couldn't break through the Infinite Prison Heaven Array, how did Ye Tian do it.

First of all, it was certain that Ye Tian must have broken through to the Triple Dao Realm.

The cultivation of the Triple Supreme Dao Realm plus the seventh sequence of Supreme Dao rules is also not comparable to the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm!

Maybe Ye Tian had other means, but no matter what, with Ye Tian's strength, he was definitely an invincible existence in the Sixfold Dao Realm.

It's just that Ye Tian can't come out of the battlefield yet.

But in fact, Ye Tian really has a way to come out.

Taisu Battle City.

Ye Tian came here and saw a large number of Supreme Dao Realms, the number far exceeded the past.

Soon, he found out what had happened.

"Taisu Palace and other forces are at war with Wuji Heavenly Palace?"

He was surprised.

After all, on the bright side, Taisu Palace and other forces are far inferior to Wuji Heavenly Palace, and a Wuji Heavenly Emperor can suppress everything.

At this time, many ordinary Supreme Dao Realms only knew that the war had begun, and they did not know the details.

However, he soon met the Longqin Palace Master.

"Longqin Palace Master, what's the matter between Taisu Palace and Wuji Heavenly Palace?" Ye Tian asked.

The master of Longqin Palace said: "Taisu Palace and many other forces have turned against Wuji Heavenly Palace together, and Wuji Heavenly Emperor has been sealed and suppressed by Taibai Sword Lord!"

"Who is the Taibai Sword Master?" Ye Tian was curious.

The Longqin Palace Master introduced: "The Longqin Palace Master is another demonic genius in the Wuji Domain who has taken the path of the strongest to the Dao in addition to you, and now his cultivation has reached the sixth-level Dao realm, and his true strength is even stronger than that of the Wuji Heavenly Emperor. This time, the Taisu Palace Lord invited the Taibai Sword Lord to suppress the Wuji Heavenly Emperor. However, after the Taibai Sword Master made a move, he left and did not participate in the rest of the matter. So, now we are in a protracted war with the Infinite Heavenly Palace. It's hard to say who will win the final victory. After all, Wuji Heavenly Palace still has many hole cards, and Wuji Heavenly Palace is the base camp, so we don't dare to attack it. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Moreover, Ye Tian also knew that many forces had all been sent to the battlefield of the True Dao Domain in order to keep their disciples with low cultivation.

The battlefield of the True Dao Domain was strictly built by the Wuji Heavenly Palace, but it was occupied by forces such as the Taisu Palace, who let the Wuji Heavenly Palace never send the powerful Supreme Dao Realm in!

Moreover, this area was far away from the base camp of Wuji Heavenly Palace, and too close to Taisu Palace, so they didn't dare to come again.

"Ye Tian, what is your current strength?"

The Longqin Palace Lord asked.

"Any Sixfold Dao Realm, I can deal with it!" Ye Tian said a little modestly.

Seeing this, the master of Longqin Palace said: "Ye Tian, we Sixfold Extreme Dao Realm are ready to go out and join the war, once we leave, there will not be a few Sixfold Highest Dao Realm here, and when the time comes, all of them will be handed over to you, once the Extreme Dao Void Demon invades, you can stop it, right?"

"No problem!"

Ye Tian nodded and agreed.

He didn't say anything about finding a way to get out of the battlefield, and even if he went out, he wouldn't be able to defeat the Sevenfold Dao Realm, and he couldn't decide the direction of the war.

Rather than that, it is better to kill some more Supreme Void Demons in this war to lighten the burden on them.

Subsequently.

The Longqin Palace Lord and others were in the sixth-fold Dao realm and even some fifth-fold Dao realms went out of the battlefield, and the entire Taisu Battle City was temporarily managed by Ye Tian.

......

The base camp of the Void Demon Fortress.

A Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon used a Supreme Dao weapon to sense the aura of that area of Taisu Battle City.

"Hey, the six realms of the Infinite Domain have disappeared one by one, and it seems that they have left the battlefield. I had long heard that a war had broken out in the Boundless Domain, and now they were all internal friction. Now, these sixfold realms have left, and all of them are low-level one-fold and two-fold Dao realms, hahaha, it's a good time for us to start killing!"

"Give the order, invade in a big way!"

"You have to beware of that double to Dao realm, it's really too hateful!"

"What are you afraid of, our whole army is dispatched, even if that guy sneaks into our rear, he can't find us, how can he kill us?"

"Then it's decided, all of them will be dispatched and killed at all costs!"

Immediately.

The dense Supreme Dao Void Demon led a large number of Supreme Dao Demons, the number of which was measured in tens of thousands, and they all shuttled towards the side of Taisu Battle City.

Soon, Taisu Zhancheng got the news, and a Taisu guard hurriedly came to report.

"The Supreme Dao Void Demon has invaded in a big way!"

Ye Tian knew.

This time, he was going to dispatch a number of replica bodies to kill all these Supreme Dao Void Demons.

After killing so many Supreme Dao Void Demons and accepting the gifts of the Heaven and Earth Origin, I wonder if I can raise my cultivation to the middle or even late stage of the Triple Dao Realm in one go?

If you can, you'll make a lot of money!
